gate_runs.detail: parseStructured.ts audited 0.74->0.94 (26 real gaps closed by parseStructured.contract.test.ts, 36 tests); 8 residual survivors all equivalent; i18n.ts + groups.tsx + ChatBox.tsx skipped (no unit-test surface / data table)

New groups-member-admitted-announcement.spec.ts (7 tests, real join-request approval + both-member render + exactly-one + AC-SCOPE-1 direct-invite regression) PASS. High-risk sibling regression set PASS: groups-rename + groups-leave-intent (announcement renderers), groups-approved-requester-label + groups-join-request-live + groups-join-request-profile (approval flow) = 33 tests. Targeted 40-test groups-bucket run in lieu of the full 60 given documented chronic flakiness of the full gate (rotating VM-latency timeouts unrelated to changes); judged by own+adjacent specs per project memory. Unit suite (3669) + mutation gate green.

Stage-1 Opus (resumable, agentId ae942eecf6d8863e4): 1 sub-sev-5 finding (empty-pubkey edge, precedent-shared) — resolved by the same hex-guard fix. Stage-2 Codex: P2 malformed-pubkey throw REMEDIATED (64-hex guard); P2 spoofability = product-owner-authorized non-action (ship-as-is, consistent with all siblings). Only post-review addition is the additive mutation-gap contract test file (test-only, green).
